UG-35  OPENINGS IN FLAT HEADS. Openings in flat heads shall meet the requirements of UG-36. Reinforcement shall be in accordance with UG-37. Refer to UG-38 for calculation methods. See also UG-40 for reinforcement limits. The flat head thickness shall be as required by UG-34. Subject to the nozzle requirements, UG-44 and UG-45 shall govern neck dimensions. When applicable, UW-16 shall govern weld sizes. Unless exempted by UG-47, inspection openings shall be provided per UG-46. For guidance on ligament efficiency, refer to UW-13.
